scripts.start: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use && npx expo start --clear'
scripts.start:tunnel: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use && npx expo start --tunnel --clear'
scripts.start:lan: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use && npx expo start --lan --clear'
scripts.start:usb: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use && npx expo start --localhost --android --clear'
scripts.ios: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use && npx expo start --ios'
scripts.web: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use && npx expo start --web'
